html:
Exclusive to:

GenericLow powerOffBurningBurntOverloaded

Winona's G.E.M.erator is a Character-exclusive Structure craftable only by Winona in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Structures Filter and Survivor Items Filter and requires one Trusty Tape, two Boards, and two Electrical Doodads to craft. Like the Winona's Generator it is used to power nearby Winona's Catapults and Winona's Spotlights.

When being placed, the generator will show a circular area where its effect will be active, with a smaller circle around the generator itself (preventing other structures from being built on top of it). Once placed, eligible structures can be "connected" to the generator simply by building it within its area of effect.

A full Winona's G.E.M.erator has a charge of 2880 (6 days). Each connected structure drains 1 charge per second. If a structure is connected to multiple generators the drain is divided by the number of connected generators. The generator itself has a minimal drain of 0.2 charge per second. Once fueled, the generator cannot be turned off and it will keep running until it runs out of fuel.

A Winona's G.E.M.erator starts without charge. It can be filled with Gems of any color to add one third of full charge per Gem. The Iridescent Gem cannot be used as fuel.

Gems are stored by supplied order in the top part of the Winona's G.E.M.erator. Every time the generator uses 1/3 of its charge, a gem is destroyed. Upon destruction of Winona's G.E.M.erator, all stored gems are dropped except the last supplied gem.

Skill Tree

Portability

With Portability skill, Winona can craft Winona's G.E.M.erator in item form. She can then deploy or dismantle it. Also, when crafting, it gives Winona's G.E.M.erator as item.

Energy-Saver

With Energy-Saver skill, placed G.E.M.erator will no longer consume energy while structures connect to it are not in use.

Greater Generator

Greater Generator skill increase the efficiency of the G.E.M.erator by 25% (Level I), 50% (Level II) or 100% (Level III).

Enlightened G.E.M.erator

With Enlightened G.E.M.erator skill, Winona can use Enlightened Shard to charge Winona's G.E.M.erator. Winona's G.E.M.erator with Enlightened Shard will not discharge (the G.E.M.erator gains infinite energy), instead the G.E.M.erator may overload if it runs out of its maximum charge without time to recover. The more Enlightened Shard it contains, the faster the G.E.M.erator recovers. If the G.E.M.erator is overloaded, it goes into a cooldown for up to 10 seconds and will start working again by turning on all gadgets.

Brilliance G.E.M.erator

With Brilliance G.E.M.erator skill, Winona can use Pure Brilliance to charge Winona's G.E.M.erator. Catapults charged by Pure Brilliance will deal 30 physical damage and 17 planar damage. Also it will deal +10% damage to Shadow Aligned creatures.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Genteel G.E.M.erator
Behold, the power of beauty!
Woven - Elegant
Jagged G.E.M.erator
A brutish display of power.

Tips

  • Since a G.E.M.erator will last 6 days total if fully fueled, each stored gem will provide up to 2 days of fuel if only one structure is powered by it.
  • Considering the ease of obtaining Red Gems and Blue Gems compared to other colors, they should always be prioritized for fueling the generator.
  • Since the generator cannot be fueled in advance, it may be ideal to fuel it before leaving camp for short expeditions, in case one needs to retreat to base if attacked.
  • Adding a gem will restore the total fuel up to the current total of gems, thus it is possible to maximize fuel efficiency by intentionally leaving a G.E.M.erator stocked with only 1 or 2 gems then refueling it before the 2nd or 3rd gem is spent, which can be monitored through the meter on the structure itself or with mods.

Trivia

  • Winona's G.E.M.erator, alongside her other gadgets and the Engineering Tab, was introduced in her Character Update as part of the character overhaul for Don't Starve Together.
  • According to Rhymes With Play #228, Winona's G.E.M.erator was supposed to be a battery, but was rather named a G.E.M.erator partly because of the wordplay.[1]

Assets

Winona's GeneratorGenteel GeneratorJagged Generator

  • Dropped
  • Build
  • Burnt

  • Dropped
  • Build
  • Burnt

  • Build
  • Burnt

Gallery

  • Winona's G.E.M.erator with no Gems socketed.
  • A burned G.E.M.erator.
  • All types of Gems socketed into G.E.M.erators.
  • Winona's G.E.M.erator's placing animation.
  • G.E.M.erators with Enlightened Shard
  • G.E.M.erators with Enlightened Shard at night
  • G.E.M.erators with Pure Brillance
  • An early concept version of Winona's G.E.M.erator from Rhymes With Play #228.
  • Earlier concepts for Winona's G.E.M.erator from Rhymes With Play #228.

References

  1. ↑ https://www.twitch.tv/videos/391953089 Rhymes With Play: Episode 228 "DST: Winona Character Update"

GenericLow powerOffBurningBurntOverloaded
“Hey! That's not science!”
–Wilson
“More of Winona's weird junk.”
–Willow
“Fixing lady doohickeys.”
–Wolfgang
“This one looks odd.”
–Wendy
“MORE POWER. YES”
–WX-78
“It's good to see her keeping an open mind.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pretty odd looking gadget there.”
–Woodie
“At least she has the sense to use gems.”
–Maxwell
“Tis fueled by glöriöus magic.”
–Wigfrid
“Machines think gem power is really tasty.”
–Webber
“It's nice to have Winona around.”
–Warly
“Big Machine Feeder!”
–Wormwood
“I don't get how gems work, I just know they do.”
–Winona
“Ooohoohoo! The mortal learned magic!”
–Wortox
“What it do?”
–Wurt
“How does it work?”
–Walter
“I see she's also been incorporating gems into her designs.”
–Wanda
“It'll turn off soon.”
–Wilson
“It's on its last legs.”
–Willow
“It does not look so good.”
–Wolfgang
“It's slowly dying.”
–Wendy
“DO NOT DIE ON ME, SISTER”
–WX-78
“The magical focus will wear out soon.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just aboot dead.”
–Woodie
“I think it's losing power.”
–Maxwell
“T'will nöt höld öut much lönger!”
–Wigfrid
“We think it's running low.”
–Webber
“It's getting a bit low, Winona.”
–Warly
“Sleepy?”
–Wormwood
“Gonna need a top up soon.”
–Winona
“Winding down, waning.”
–Wortox
“It looking tired.”
–Wurt
“I think we need to hook up a another generator to this generator.”
–Walter
“A fresh gem should keep it going a while longer.”
–Wanda
“Science beats magic, every time.”
–Wilson
“Oops. It broke.”
–Willow
“Fixing lady, quick, come fix!”
–Wolfgang
“I think it wants... gems...”
–Wendy
“WHY”
–WX-78
“It needs a new magic focus.”
–Wickerbottom
“Plum tuckered.”
–Woodie
“Magic isn't so easy, is it?”
–Maxwell
“It hath löst its incredible pöwer!”
–Wigfrid
“Winoooona! The thing broke!”
–Webber
“What sort of fuel does this take?”
–Warly
“Oh. Needs sparkly”
–Wormwood
“Needs a few more'a those gem thingies.”
–Winona
“Playtime's over!”
–Wortox
“It supposed to be doing something?”
–Wurt
“It ran out of gem power.”
–Walter
“It ran out of magical energy.”
–Wanda
“It's on fire!”
–Wilson
“Hehehe!”
–Willow
“Is burning!”
–Wolfgang
“Oh no...”
–Wendy
“HURRY, SAVE IT”
–WX-78
“Oh dear, who did this?”
–Wickerbottom
“Woah! Careful, Lucy!”
–Woodie
“I'm going to pretend I don't see it.”
–Maxwell
“Tis engulfed in flame!”
–Wigfrid
“Oh, oh!”
–Webber
“It, oh, it appears to be on fire.”
–Warly
“No fire! No!”
–Wormwood
“Quick! Put it out!”
–Winona
“Hoohoohoo!”
–Wortox
“It supposed to do that, florp?”
–Wurt
“Ah!! That's how forest fires start!”
–Walter
“I probably should have warned her that was going to happen.”
–Wanda
“Science couldn't save it.”
–Wilson
“Well, that was mildly entertaining.”
–Willow
“Is all burned up.”
–Wolfgang
“It all crumbles to ash, in the end.”
–Wendy
“IT WAS A GOOD MACHINE”
–WX-78
“I do hope she'll build another.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a right shame.”
–Woodie
“Oh. What a pity.”
–Maxwell
“'Twas devöured by Hel's fire!”
–Wigfrid
“Oh no! It got burnt!”
–Webber
“Crisp, non?”
–Warly
“Fire hurt it”
–Wormwood
“Criminy! My machine!”
–Winona
“How hilarious!”
–Wortox
“Oh well.”
–Wurt
“Well... I guess Winona'll have to build a new one.”
–Walter
“I wonder how quickly she can build a new one...”
–Wanda
“It's about to explode! ...Sorry, old habit from my lab days.”
–Wilson
“I'll show you overheated...”
–Willow
“Is supposed to do that, yes?”
–Wolfgang
“It takes a lot of breaks.”
–Wendy
“OVERALLS IS OVERWORKING THE MACHINES IN HER CARE. ABOMINABLE”
–WX-78
“Poor thing overworked itself.”
–Wickerbottom
“Worked a little too hard, eh?”
–Woodie
“Give it a rest.”
–Maxwell
“It must catch its breath.”
–Wigfrid
“Hello?”
–Webber
“Too hot!”
–Warly
“Oh. Machine not happy...”
–Wormwood
“Yikes! Better give it a minute to cool off!”
–Winona
“It fired up and fizzled out, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Glorp! Hot! Hot!”
–Wurt
“I think it's too hot, Woby.”
–Walter
“Can't push these gems too hard.”
–Wanda
Winona's G.E.M.erator is a Character-exclusive Structure craftable only by Winona in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Structures Filter and Survivor Items Filter and requires one Trusty Tape, two Boards, and two Electrical Doodads to craft. Like the Winona's Generator it is used to power nearby Winona's Catapults and Winona's Spotlights.
When being placed, the generator will show a circular area where its effect will be active, with a smaller circle around the generator itself (preventing other structures from being built on top of it). Once placed, eligible structures can be "connected" to the generator simply by building it within its area of effect.
A full Winona's G.E.M.erator has a charge of 2880 (6 days). Each connected structure drains 1 charge per second. If a structure is connected to multiple generators the drain is divided by the number of connected generators. The generator itself has a minimal drain of 0.2 charge per second. Once fueled, the generator cannot be turned off and it will keep running until it runs out of fuel.
A Winona's G.E.M.erator starts without charge. It can be filled with Gems of any color to add one third of full charge per Gem. The Iridescent Gem cannot be used as fuel.
Gems are stored by supplied order in the top part of the Winona's G.E.M.erator. Every time the generator uses 1/3 of its charge, a gem is destroyed. Upon destruction of Winona's G.E.M.erator, all stored gems are dropped except the last supplied gem.
Skill Tree[edit | edit source]

With Portability skill, Winona can craft Winona's G.E.M.erator in item form. She can then deploy or dismantle it. Also, when crafting, it gives Winona's G.E.M.erator as item.
Energy-Saver[edit | edit source]
With Energy-Saver skill, placed G.E.M.erator will no longer consume energy while structures connect to it are not in use.
Greater Generator[edit | edit source]
Greater Generator skill increase the efficiency of the G.E.M.erator by 25% (Level I), 50% (Level II) or 100% (Level III).
Enlightened G.E.M.erator[edit | edit source]
With Enlightened G.E.M.erator skill, Winona can use Enlightened Shard to charge Winona's G.E.M.erator. Winona's G.E.M.erator with Enlightened Shard will not discharge (the G.E.M.erator gains infinite energy), instead the G.E.M.erator may overload if it runs out of its maximum charge without time to recover. The more Enlightened Shard it contains, the faster the G.E.M.erator recovers. If the G.E.M.erator is overloaded, it goes into a cooldown for up to 10 seconds and will start working again by turning on all gadgets.
Brilliance G.E.M.erator[edit | edit source]

Tips[edit | edit source]
Since a G.E.M.erator will last 6 days total if fully fueled, each stored gem will provide up to 2 days of fuel if only one structure is powered by it.
Considering the ease of obtaining Red Gems and Blue Gems compared to other colors, they should always be prioritized for fueling the generator.
Since the generator cannot be fueled in advance, it may be ideal to fuel it before leaving camp for short expeditions, in case one needs to retreat to base if attacked.
Adding a gem will restore the total fuel up to the current total of gems, thus it is possible to maximize fuel efficiency by intentionally leaving a G.E.M.erator stocked with only 1 or 2 gems then refueling it before the 2nd or 3rd gem is spent, which can be monitored through the meter on the structure itself or with mods.

Winona's G.E.M.erator, alongside her other gadgets and the Engineering Tab, was introduced in her Character Update as part of the character overhaul for Don't Starve Together.
According to Rhymes With Play #228, Winona's G.E.M.erator was supposed to be a battery, but was rather named a G.E.M.erator partly because of the wordplay.[1]

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

G.E.M.erator của Winona là một Cấu trúc dành riêng cho Nhân vật chỉ có Winona mới có thể chế tạo được trong Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Cấu trúc và Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Sống sót và yêu cầu một Băng tin cậy, hai Bảng mạch và hai Doodad Điện để chế tạo. Giống như Máy phát điện của Winona, nó được sử dụng để cung cấp năng lượng cho Máy bắn đá của Winona và Đèn chiếu sáng của Winona ở gần.
title: Winona's G.E.M.erator

It is found in the [[Structures Filter]] and [[Survivor Items Filter]] and requires one [[Trusty Tape]], two [[Boards]], and two [[Electrical Doodad]]s to craft. Like the [[Winona's Generator]] it is used to power nearby [[Winona's Catapult]]s and [[Winona's Spotlight]]s. When being placed, the generator will show a circular area where its effect will be active, with a smaller circle around the generator itself (preventing other structures from being built on top of it). Once placed, eligible structures can be "connected" to the generator simply by building it within its area of effect. A full Winona's G.E.M.erator has a charge of 2880 (6 days). Each connected structure drains 1 charge per second. If a structure is connected to multiple generators the drain is divided by the number of connected generators. The generator itself has a minimal drain of 0.2 charge per second. Once fueled, the generator cannot be turned off and it will keep running until it runs out of fuel. A Winona's G.E.M.erator starts without charge. It can be filled with [[Gem]]s of any color to add one third of full charge per Gem. The [[Iridescent Gem]] cannot be used as fuel. Gems are stored by supplied order in the top part of the Winona's G.E.M.erator. Every time the generator uses 1/3 of its charge, a gem is destroyed. Upon destruction of Winona's G.E.M.erator, all stored gems are dropped except the last supplied gem. =={{pic|48|Insight}} Skill Tree== === {{picDark|32|Portability}} Portability === With [[Portability]] skill, Winona can craft Winona's G.E.M.erator in item form. She can then deploy or dismantle it. Also, when crafting, it gives '''Winona's G.E.M.erator''' as item. === {{picDark|32|Energy-Saver}} Energy-Saver === With [[Energy-Saver]] skill, placed G.E.M.erator will no longer consume energy while structures connect to it are not in use. === {{picDark|32|Greater Generator I}} Greater Generator === [[Greater Generator I|Greater Generator]] skill increase the efficiency of the G.E.M.erator by 25% (Level I), 50% (Level II) or 100% (Level III). === {{picDark|32|Enlightened G.E.M.erator}} Enlightened G.E.M.erator === With [[Enlightened G.E.M.erator]] skill, Winona can use [[Enlightened Shard]] to charge Winona's G.E.M.erator. Winona's G.E.M.erator with Enlightened Shard will not discharge (the G.E.M.erator gains infinite energy), instead the G.E.M.erator may overload if it runs out of its maximum charge without time to recover. The more Enlightened Shard it contains, the faster the G.E.M.erator recovers. If the G.E.M.erator is overloaded, it goes into a cooldown for up to 10 seconds and will start working again by turning on all gadgets. === {{picDark|32|Brilliance G.E.M.erator}} Brilliance G.E.M.erator === With [[Brilliance G.E.M.erator]] skill, Winona can use [[Pure Brilliance]] to charge Winona's G.E.M.erator. Catapults charged by Pure Brilliance will deal 30 physical damage and 17 planar damage. Also it will deal +10% damage to [[Shadow Aligned]] creatures. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Portables Structures|Belongings}}
{{SkinInfo |image = Genteel G.E.M.erator Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |name = Genteel G.E.M.erator |description = Behold, the power of beauty! }} {{SkinInfo |image = Jagged G.E.M.erator Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |name = Jagged G.E.M.erator |description = A brutish display of power. }}
=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips== *Since a G.E.M.erator will last 6 days total if fully fueled, each stored gem will provide up to 2 days of fuel if only one structure is powered by it. *Considering the ease of obtaining [[Red Gem]]s and [[Blue Gem]]s compared to other colors, they should always be prioritized for fueling the generator. *Since the generator cannot be fueled in advance, it may be ideal to fuel it before leaving camp for short expeditions, in case one needs to retreat to base if attacked. *Adding a gem will restore the total fuel up to the current total of gems, thus it is possible to maximize fuel efficiency by intentionally leaving a G.E.M.erator stocked with only 1 or 2 gems then refueling it before the 2nd or 3rd gem is spent, which can be monitored through the meter on the structure itself or with mods. =={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Winona's G.E.M.erator, alongside her other gadgets and the Engineering Tab, was introduced in her [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 7, 2019 - Winona Character Update|Character Update]] as part of the character overhaul for ''Don't Starve Together''. * According to ''Rhymes With Play'' #228, Winona's G.E.M.erator was supposed to be a battery, but was rather named a G.E.M.erator partly because of the wordplay.https://www.twitch.tv/videos/391953089 Rhymes With Play: Episode 228 "DST: Winona Character Update" == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Winona's Generator= Winona's G.E.M.erator Dropped.png|Dropped Winona's G.E.M.erator Build.png|Build Winona's G.E.M.erator Burnt.png|Burnt |-| Genteel Generator= Genteel G.E.M.erator Dropped.png|Dropped Genteel G.E.M.erator Build.png|Build Genteel G.E.M.erator Burnt.png|Burnt |-| Jagged Generator= Jagged G.E.M.erator Build.png|Build Genteel G.E.M.erator Burnt.png|Burnt =={{pic|28|Blueprint}} Gallery== GEMerator Ingame.png|Winona's G.E.M.erator with no Gems socketed.
